title: tectaria rheosora
intro: Tectaria rheosora, also known as the rhizome fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tectaria rheosora include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Tectaria rheosora include tea, infusions, and dried rhizome extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
